quotes.text: Watch what users do, not what they say. They'll tell you they use your product daily. Their login history tells a different story.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best product decisions come from observing users, not surveying them. Surveys measure opinions. Observations measure behavior.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best user research is watching someone use your product without telling them what to do. The discomfort reveals everything.
quotes.author: based
